ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Cancel
ast.target: 取消

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Confirm
ast.target: 确认

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A refresh token is required to access your Google Drive for syncing. We suggest cloning your Google Drive vault to the current vault BEFORE syncing.
ast.target: 需要刷新令牌才能访问您的 Google Drive 进行同步。我们建议在同步之前将您的 Google Drive 保险库克隆到当前保险库。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Refresh token
ast.target: 刷新令牌

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter your refresh token
ast.target: 输入您的刷新令牌

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Do you want to push the following changes to Google Drive:
ast.target: 您是否要将以下更改推送到 Google Drive：

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Push confirmation
ast.target: 推送确认

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Undo confirmation
ast.target: 撤销确认

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Something is wrong with your internet connection, so we could not fetch a new access token! Once you're back online, please restart Obsidian.
ast.target: 您的网络连接出现问题，因此我们无法获取新的访问令牌！一旦您恢复在线，请重新启动 Obsidian。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Something is wrong with your refresh token, please restart Obsidian and then reset it.
ast.target: 您的刷新令牌出现问题，请重新启动 Obsidian 然后重置它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred fetching Google Drive files.
ast.target: 获取 Google Drive 文件时发生错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred fetching Google Drive changes.
ast.target: 获取 Google Drive 更改时发生错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You're up to date!
ast.target: 已是最新状态！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Files have been synced from Google Drive!
ast.target: 文件已从 Google Drive 同步！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred deleting Google Drive files.
ast.target: 删除 Google Drive 文件时发生错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred creating Google Drive folders.
ast.target: 创建 Google Drive 文件夹时发生错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred creating Google Drive files.
ast.target: 创建 Google Drive 文件时发生错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred modifying Google Drive files.
ast.target: 修改 Google Drive 文件时发生错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred creating Google Drive config files.
ast.target: 创建 Google Drive 配置文件时发生错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Sync complete!
ast.target: 同步完成！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Reset complete.
ast.target: 重置完成。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You are not connected to the internet, so you cannot sync right now. Please try syncing once you have connection again.
ast.target: 您当前未连接到互联网，因此无法立即同步。请在恢复连接后再次尝试同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Syncing (0%)
ast.target: 同步中 (0%)

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred fetching Google Drive changes token.
ast.target: 获取 Google Drive 更改令牌时发生错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Refresh token saved! Reload Obsidian to activate sync.
ast.target: 刷新令牌已保存！请重新加载 Obsidian 以激活同步。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Push to Google Drive
ast.target: 推送到 Google Drive

ast.name: name
ast.source: Pull from Google Drive
ast.target: 从 Google Drive 拉取

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reset local vault to Google Drive
ast.target: 将本地保险库重置为 Google Drive 版本

ast.name: text
ast.source: Get refresh token
ast.target: 获取刷新令牌
